response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with ~14 years of professional experience, well above the 6+ year requirement. His current role at re:cinq directly involves TypeScript/Node.js full-stack work plus AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators), which maps almost perfectly onto the primary stack and the AI agent development requirement. He has React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, Git, and TDD experience across multiple senior roles, plus Java exposure for the secondary stack. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Vitest, and no PostgreSQL called out, but these are easily bridgeable given his breadth.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js + React + AI-agent (MCP) experience at current role matches the stack
14+ years across full-stack, backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps — well beyond seniority bar
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops, and OSS contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (uses TS/Node but framework fit unclear)
PostgreSQL not mentioned — primarily MongoDB/MySQL on the database side
Heavy DLang focus in several past roles may signal divergence from mainstream JS ecosystem depth

key_factors.factor: Current TypeScript/Node + AI-agent (MCP) work at re:cinq
14+ years senior full-stack experience with React and cloud/Docker
